summary: PR #2515 performed decomp matching work in src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c for capsule/collision routines. The PR body reports four new 100% matches, four improved but still sub-100% functions, role-based parameter naming for lbColl_80006E58, removal of an unused JObj matrix helper and assert strings, Vec3 consolidation, assignment-expression shaping, and a float-register tactic for caching 1.0. A bot report confirmed the four new matches and improvements but also reported a temporary broken match in lbColl_80005C44; loaded evidence does not include a later final report showing whether that regression was fixed before merge.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; capsule collision matching, naming, local type/Vec3 cleanup, helper removal, and float/register allocation work.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c added 670 deleted 621 hunks 50
pr_body: Match work on `lbcollision.c`
diff.diff: only diff shown is src/melee/lb/lbcollision.c

what_changed.text: Renamed lbColl_80006E58 parameters from arg-style names to collision-role names such as hit_start, hit_end, hurt_start, hurt_end, hit_closest, hurt_closest, hurt_mtx, out_contact_pos, out_overlap, hit_radius, hurt_radius, and broadphase_scale.

diff.diff: lbColl_80006E58 prototype changed from arg0/arg1/... to role-based names

what_changed.text: Removed static inline lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr and its local assert strings lbColl_804D3700 and lbColl_804D3708 after they became unreferenced.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Drop lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr and its two lbColl_804D37* assert strings
diff.diff: deletion of lbColl_804D3700, lbColl_804D3708, and lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr

what_changed.text: Collapsed some scalar x/y/z temporaries into Vec3 temporaries in lbColl_80005C44 and in branches of larger capsule closest-point logic.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Collapse float xx_x/_y/_z triplets into Vec3 xx
diff.diff: examples replacing separate sp/float coordinate temporaries with Vec3 c3, a2, c2, b0

what_changed.text: Introduced local helper between(float x, float lo, float hi) and changed nearzero to compare directly against 1e-5F and -1e-5F in the visible diff excerpt.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: added static inline bool between
diff.diff: nearzero changed from volatile lbColl_804D79F0/lbColl_804D79F4 loads to x < 1e-5F && x > -1e-5F

what_changed.text: Used SQ macro in lbColl_80005C44 distance comparison instead of spelling out repeated multiplication.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: temp_f2 * temp_f2 and d2_* multiplications changed to SQ(temp_f2) < SQ(d2_x) + SQ(d2_y) + SQ(d2_z)

what_changed.text: Adjusted PAD_STACK values and local declaration scopes in lbColl_80006094 and lbColl_800067F8 as part of matching work.

diff.diff: lbColl_800067F8 PAD_STACK(24) changed to PAD_STACK(72)

smart_moves.text: Parameter names in lbColl_80006E58 encode collision roles and output roles, making the complex capsule/hurt/hit calculation easier to review while staying grounded in PR-visible behavior.

smart_moves.text: Removing lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr avoided carrying a TU-local reimplementation of a JObj helper when the PR evidence says it was no longer referenced.

smart_moves.text: Using Vec3 temporaries for coordinate triplets made vector roles more explicit than separate generated-looking scalar stack names.

smart_moves.text: The author explicitly called out remaining residual float-register-allocation mismatches instead of presenting the large functions as fully solved.

decomp_lessons.text: For collision math routines, replacing arg-style parameters with role names can clarify hit-vs-hurt endpoints, closest points, radii, transforms, and outputs without requiring a full semantic rename of every internal temporary.
evidence_refs: pr_body: parameter role list
diff.diff: lbColl_80006E58 prototype rename

decomp_lessons.text: Coordinate triplets exposed by decompiler output may correspond to authored Vec3 values; this PR used Vec3 consolidation as a matching/readability tactic in lbcollision closest-point code.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Collapse float xx_x/_y/_z triplets into Vec3 xx
diff.diff: Vec3 c3/a2/c2/b0 examples

decomp_lessons.text: Local helper cleanup should be paired with reference evidence: this PR removed a JObj matrix helper and its assert strings only after stating they were no longer referenced.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Drop lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr and assert strings; no longer referenced
diff.diff: helper deletion

decomp_lessons.text: Score-improving PRs can still introduce temporary regressions; curator should retain the bot-reported broken lbColl_80005C44 match as evidence unless a later report is inspected.

source_update_candidates.title: Treat Vec3 consolidation as a local-style candidate when decompiler emits x/y/z scalar triplets
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding or cross-linking a standard note that, when local math code clearly operates on vector triplets and project types exist, reviewers should try Vec3 temporaries before preserving generated-looking x/y/z scalar stacks. PR #2515 is evidence only for lbcollision-style collision math, not a universal rule.

diff.diff: Vec3 replacements in closest-point branches

decomp_standards: typed-fields-over-pointer-math
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR provides a concrete reusable pattern, but global promotion should be curator-reviewed and scoped because vector consolidation can affect stack/register allocation.

source_update_candidates.title: Record regression-bot caveat for match-improvement PRs
source_update_candidates.text: Consider documenting that a match-improvement PR can have an intermediate bot report with broken matches; intake/curation should not assume regressions were resolved without a later report, explicit review, or final diff evidence.
evidence_refs: issuecomment-4491801020: bot report lists lbColl_80005C44 as broken
issuecomment-4492065244: author says will fix the regressions
decomp_standards: verification-and-regression-ledger
source_update_candidates.reason: This PR has a clear bot-reported regression and author acknowledgement but lacks loaded final verification evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the reported four new matches as final repository-wide validation beyond the loaded bot report and PR body.
Do not claim lbColl_80005C44 regression was fixed; the loaded slice lacks a later final report.
Do not treat PAD_STACK increases or callee-save-float caching as general style; standards require narrow verifier evidence for such tactics.
Do not infer reviewer intent or approval rationale because no formal reviews or review comments are loaded.
Do not promote the author’s field/name confidence into fully accepted semantic facts beyond the role names shown in the diff and PR body.
